title: savepointd v0.2 --daemon mode: subscribe to substrate event bus
description: Today savepointd is one-shot (synchronous handle of a single .commitIntent per CLI invocation). v0.2 should subscribe to the substrate event bus as a long-running daemon, registering SavepointService and processing per-.git queue entries asynchronously. Requires recon of the substrate event-bus dispatcher (digikoma-watcher-kernel-style host or similar) — I haven't located it as a runnable surface. Investigation needed before authoring.
